subject: persistent-lan-agent-and-guarded-drive-collaboration
implementationClaims: Each installation can opt in to a persistent outbound LAN test agent from Settings without exposing a LAN listener.
The app persists routing metadata and the pairing-key path, never pairing-key contents, and reaps the agent on disable, reconfiguration, and shutdown.
The repository MCP host supervises its local packaged agent with bounded restart backoff.
MCP exposes bounded Drive project catalog, exact-revision share, and exact-identity join actions through the live product boundary.
The physical harness has a fifteen-second heartbeat, five-minute deadline, exact two-node gate, concurrent convergence proof, and stale-write rejection.
nonClaims: This record does not claim the physical two-install Drive convergence harness has passed.
The LAN control plane does not itself synchronize research data.
Drive delivery remains polling-based and does not provide presence or sub-second delivery.
Node labels and saved researcher names are not authenticated human identities.
WebSocket, direct peer transport, bounded Drive compaction, and conflict-safe shared rename remain open.
